llm_response:
Dear Conference Committee, I am writing to inquire about the upcoming International Tech Summit scheduled for October 15th through October 17th. As an interested attendee, I require specific details regarding the registration process to ensure I can plan my participation effectively.

Could you please provide more information regarding the current registration fees and the strict deadlines for submission? It is crucial that I understand the cost structure and the timeline before finalizing my decision.

The registration portal appears to be under maintenance, so I need clarification on whether early bird rates are still available. Please confirm the status of the registration system and any potential delays in processing.

I would also appreciate details on the cancellation policy and refund procedures in case of unforeseen circumstances. Understanding these terms is essential for managing my financial expectations properly.

Thank you for your time and assistance in resolving these matters. I look forward to your prompt response regarding the registration details.
